title: Make it Explode
description: Get some TNT or any other explosives and destroy a more physic realistic world with this new modpack. Download maps for even more destruction.
body:
The modpack aim to enance the visual aspect of minecraft and enhance the explosives. 
How ? 
With physics mods (blocks now fragment)
With more explosives 
With Shadders

This is the perfect mod for people who sometime just want to sit and relax and explode some blocks in minecraft to see how satisfying it is. 

⚠️ Due to the shaders and physic mod, the modpack is consuming a lot of resources
